title: オーダートレーニング！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I head to the rooftop to relax on my break,
when...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Um... I'd like one carrot mouse flappy beanzo,
please!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Ack, that's not right! A carrot m-m-mousse...
flappy... flappy...

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, fiddlesticks! There's no way I'm gonna be
able t'order in one of those fancy-pants city
cafes!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
The carrot mousse frappuccino? Isn't that from
that cafe that's been all the rage recently?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Huh? Ah! C-City?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Are you practicing ordering? Why?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Ngh... I wanted t'be hip 'n cool like you.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hm? I mean, that just comes with experience.
How about... Okay, follow me.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
The cafe's a little far, but we can walk around
here today and let you get used to the vibe.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Me, in the trendy part of town, with you?!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Trendy part of town? No need to make such a big
deal out of it. Just be yourself.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
B-but I'm worried I'm gonna mess up... Then
ever'body'll know I'm just a country bumpkin.
Even you...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Country, city, who cares? Would you laugh at me
if I messed up?

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
No way, not in a million years! Ever'body makes
mistakes... Ah.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
See? There's nothing to be embarrassed about.
Nothing ventured, nothing gained, as they say.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Wooow. "Nothing ventured, nothing gained"! You
city folks sure are great with words!

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text: Thanks, City! I feel like I can pull it off!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Good, that's the spirit. Let me know when you go
to that cafe, and I'll tag along.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Really?! Great! I won't be scared one bit if you're
there!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Heh... You give me too much credit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold City laughs quietly as Yukino Bijin
vigorously says "nothing ventured, nothing
gained" over and over to herself.
